articles.title: BRO recruitment 2026: Applications open for 899 electrician and other posts: Check complete details here
articles.summary: The Border Roads Organisation (BRO) has begun the recruitment process for 899 vacancies, including Electrician and several other posts. Candidates can submit applications online until July 4, 2026.

articles.title: 'Cannot continue indefinitely': Supreme Court extends TET deadline till August 2028
articles.summary: The Supreme Court mandated that in-service teachers must pass the Teacher Eligibility Test (TET) to continue their employment, extending the deadline to August 31, 2028. Dismissing review petitions, the bench emphasized the RTE Act's intent for all teachers to meet minimum qualifications, prioritizing children's educational future..
